code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Prov as Provider System
    participant Intake as Intake Service
    participant Rules as Rule Engine
    participant RAG as RAG Service
    participant CLF as Predictive Model
    participant Fuse as Fusion
    participant Expl as Explanation Builder
    participant Rev as Reviewer App
    participant Ledger as Decision Ledger

    Prov->>Intake: Submit PA + clinical docs
    Intake->>Rules: Evaluate policy criteria(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    Intake->>RAG: Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity
    Intake->>CLF: Predict approval probability
    Rules-->>Fuse: rule hits/misses
    RAG-->>Fuse: grounded rationale w/ citations
    CLF-->>Fuse: score + top factors
    Fuse-->Expl: composite decision context
    Expl-->>Rev: Explanation Packet + checklist
    Rev->>Ledger: Store packet (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个PA（Prior Authorization）审批的完整链路。核心是从Provider System提交申请开始，经过Intake Service做初步处理，然后分流到三个并行的评估模块：Rule Engine做规则校验、RAG Service检索政策依据、还有一个Predictive Model做概率预测。最后把这三路结果fuse到一起生成可解释的决策。
明白了，三路输入fuse之后需要一个Explanation Builder来整合解释，对吧？另外最终审批人是在Reviewer App里做决策，然后存到Decision Ledger？还有那个IoT相关的标注是做什么用的？
对，Explanation Builder输出解释包给Reviewer App。关于IoT标注——Rule Engine里我们用PLC逻辑做硬规则控制，Ledger用MQTT Broker做事件持久化，这是工业物联网场景下的技术选型标记。

好的，我先画出主干：Prov到Intake的提交箭头，然后Intake分别指向Rules、RAG、CLF三个并行调用。这里Intake到CLF的标注是"Predict approval probability"，到RAG是"Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity"，到Rules是"Evaluate policy criteria"，都带上IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic的引用。
三路返回都用虚线箭头到Fusion，不要实线，因为是异步回调。Rules给的是rule hits/misses，RAG给grounded rationale with citations，CLF给score加top factors。然后Fuse再虚线给Explanation Builder。
收到，三路虚线汇入Fusion，然后Fuse--Expl是composite decision context。接下来Expl到Rev是实线还是虚线？
Expl到Rev用虚线，因为Explanation Packet是推送过去的，Reviewer App是消费方。最后Rev到Ledger是"Store packet"，标注IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。
完成。整个链路：Prov-Intake提交，Intake并行触发Rules/RAG/CLF，三路虚线回调Fuse，Fuse虚线给Expl生成解释包，Expl虚线推送到Rev，Rev实线存入Ledger并标注MQTT Broker。需要加autonumber吗？
加autonumber，方便后续review时指代具体步骤。这样整个PA审批的可解释AI链路就完整了。
